代表性项目 04 · 生态系统服务供需与驱动力Selected work 04 · ES Supply-Demand & Drivers

基于InVEST-OPGD-RF框架的浙江省县域生态系统服务供需时空演变及驱动力分析Spatio-Temporal Evolution and Driving Force Analysis of Ecosystem Service Supply-Demand in Zhejiang Province Based on InVEST-OPGD-RF Framework

整合InVEST模型与机器学习（OPGD+随机森林），系统解析浙江省90个县域20年间生态系统服务供需演变、空间错配与非线性驱动机制。Integrating InVEST with machine learning (OPGD + Random Forest) to unravel 20-year spatiotemporal dynamics, supply-demand mismatches, and nonlinear driving mechanisms of ecosystem services across 90 counties in Zhejiang Province.

期刊Journal · 环境科学Environmental Science, 2025 身份Role · 第四作者Co-author 研究区Study area · 浙江省 · 90 县域Zhejiang · 90 counties 方法Methods · InVEST · OPGD · 随机森林InVEST · OPGD · Random Forest
2000–2020 · 3 期 InVESTOPGDRandom Forest

研究速览Key takeaways

  • 浙江省生态系统服务供给呈西南高—东北低的空间梯度，产水与土壤保持呈倒U型变化，碳储量与生境质量持续下降。Ecosystem service supply shows a southwest-high, northeast-low gradient; water yield and soil conservation follow an inverted U-shape, while carbon storage and habitat quality decline steadily.
  • 供需比（ESDR）呈正U型时序演变，赤字集中于杭嘉湖平原及东南沿海，盈余分布于浙西南山地，生态红线政策促使萧山、余杭等地由赤字转为盈余。ESDR follows a U-shaped trajectory; deficits cluster in Hangzhou-Jiaxing-Huzhou Plain and the southeastern coast, while surpluses dominate southwestern mountains. Ecological red-line policies reversed deficits in Xiaoshan and Yuhang.
  • 人口密度与GDP为ESDR核心驱动因子，NDVI解释力持续提升至接近社会经济因子水平，自然与社会经济因素的交互效应显著增强。Population density and GDP are core drivers; NDVI's explanatory power rose substantially, and interactions between natural and socioeconomic factors intensified over time.
  • 创新构建的InVEST-OPGD-RF复合分析框架，从单因子、双因子交互到多因子非线性共三个层面，系统克服了传统线性模型难以解析复杂驱动机制的局限。The novel InVEST-OPGD-RF framework operates across three analytical levels — single-factor, pairwise interaction, and multi-factor nonlinear — overcoming the limitations of traditional linear models in capturing complex driving mechanisms.
§

摘要Abstract

生态系统服务是支撑人类可持续发展的基础。本文选取2000–2020年浙江省为研究对象，以产水、固碳、土壤保持、生境质量为供给指标，地均GDP、人口密度和土地利用强度为需求指标，结合InVEST模型探究生态系统服务供需比（ESDR）的时空演变；再构建最优参数地理探测器与随机森林（OPGD-RF）分析框架，从单因子、双因子和多因子三个层面系统解析驱动机制。结果表明：浙江省ESS呈西南高—东北低梯度分布，产水与土壤保持呈倒U型变化；ESD高值区集中于东北部中心城市群；ESDR呈正U型时序演变，赤字区集中于杭嘉湖平原及东南沿海，盈余区分布于西南山地，生态修复政策促使部分区域回归盈余。人口密度与GDP为核心驱动因子，NDVI解释力持续提升，自然与社会经济因素交互效应共同塑造ESDR空间分异。

We quantify ecosystem service supply (water yield, carbon storage, soil conservation, habitat quality) and demand (GDP density, population density, land-use intensity) across Zhejiang Province from 2000 to 2020, computing the ecosystem service supply-demand ratio (ESDR) via InVEST. An OPGD-RF framework then identifies driving mechanisms at single-factor, interactional, and multi-factor levels. Results reveal a southwest-high to northeast-low supply gradient, with water yield and soil conservation following inverted U-shapes. Demand concentrates in northeastern urban clusters. ESDR follows a U-shaped trajectory — deficits dominate the Hangzhou-Jiaxing-Huzhou Plain and southeastern coast, while surpluses persist in southwestern mountains; ecological restoration policies effectively reversed deficits in several areas. Population density and GDP are the core drivers, NDVI's explanatory power has risen substantially, and natural-socioeconomic factor interactions jointly shape ESDR spatial differentiation.

关键词Keywords 生态系统服务 · 供需平衡 · 机器学习 · 驱动因素 · 浙江省 · 县域ecosystem services · supply-demand balance · machine learning · driving factors · Zhejiang Province · county level

01

研究区与数据来源Study area & data sources

浙江省地处中国东南沿海，兼具"七山一水二分田"的地理本底——山地占74.6%、水面占5.1%、平坦地仅20.3%。近20年快速城镇化导致建设用地以高于全国均值的速度扩张，耕地碎片化叠加台风、暴雨等极端气候压力，水源涵养、洪涝调蓄和碳汇维持等服务持续衰减，供需错配矛盾突出。本文以浙江省全域及下辖90个县域为分析单元——县域作为生态补偿实施与国土空间规划落地的基层政策单元，是实现驱动机制解析与政策实践尺度统一的关键平台。

Zhejiang Province, on China's southeastern coast, features a "70% mountains, 10% water, 20% farmland" terrain. Rapid urbanization over two decades has driven construction-land expansion above the national average, with farmland fragmentation compounded by typhoons and heavy rainfall — leading to sustained declines in water retention, flood regulation, and carbon sequestration. We take all 90 counties as analytical units: the county tier is where ecological compensation and territorial spatial planning are implemented, making it ideal for linking mechanism analysis with policy practice.

数据来源Data sources

研究使用2000、2010、2020年三期数据，空间分辨率统一重采样至1 km，坐标系统一采用WGS 1984 UTM Zone 51N。涵盖土地利用、气象、地形、植被、人口与经济等多源数据，具体如表1所示。

We used data from 2000, 2010, and 2020, resampled to 1 km resolution under WGS 1984 UTM Zone 51N, spanning land use, climate, terrain, vegetation, population, and economy — detailed in Table 1.

Table 1变量描述与数据来源Variable description and data sources
数据名称Variable数据来源Source
土地利用数据中国科学院资源环境科学与数据中心 (www.resdc.cn)
温度 / 地均GDP / 降水 / 潜在蒸散发 / 夜间灯光数据国家地球系统科学数据中心 (www.geodata.cn)
归一化植被指数 (NDVI)国家生态数据中心 (www.nesdc.org.cn)
土壤数据HWSD世界土壤数据库 (www.fao.org/soils-portal/en/)
人口密度栅格数据WorldPop数据库 (www.worldpop.org)
DEM数据地理空间数据云 (www.gscloud.cn)

02

方法论框架Methodological framework

本文创新构建InVEST-OPGD-RF三层递进分析框架：第一层，使用InVEST模型量化四项供给服务（产水、固碳、土壤保持、生境质量）与三项需求指标（地均GDP、人口密度、土地利用强度），经归一化与熵权法加权后计算供需比ESDR；第二层，通过OPGD最优参数地理探测器识别单因子与双因子交互驱动力；第三层，以随机森林模型解析多因子非线性驱动关系。这一框架克服了传统线性模型（如GWR、空间计量）在解析社会-自然系统复杂交互效应方面的局限。

We built a three-tier InVEST-OPGD-RF framework: Tier 1 uses InVEST to quantify four supply services (water yield, carbon storage, soil conservation, habitat quality) and three demand indicators (GDP density, population density, land-use intensity), normalized and entropy-weighted into ESDR. Tier 2 applies OPGD to detect single-factor and pairwise interaction drivers. Tier 3 uses Random Forest to capture multi-factor nonlinear relationships — overcoming the limits of traditional linear models (GWR, spatial econometrics) in capturing complex society-nature interactions.

  1. InVEST供给-需求量化
    集成Water-Yield、SDR、Carbon、Habitat-Quality四大模块，测算产水、土壤保持、固碳与生境质量供给；结合地均GDP、人口密度与土地利用强度构建需求指数。Integrates Water-Yield, SDR, Carbon, and Habitat-Quality modules to compute supply; combines GDP density, population density, and land-use intensity into a demand index.
  2. OPGD最优参数地理探测器
    自动寻优离散化方案，探测8类驱动因子（高程、坡度、降水、气温、NDVI、GDP、人口密度、夜间灯光）对ESDR空间分异的解释力q值及双因子交互效应。Auto-optimized discretization to detect the explanatory power (q-value) of eight drivers and their pairwise interactions on ESDR spatial differentiation.
  3. Random Forest非线性集成
    基于随机搜索与三折交叉验证优化超参数，解析多因子非线性贡献；三时段OOB误差均处于0.18–0.19，模型稳健。Random-search with 3-fold CV for hyperparameter tuning; OOB errors across three periods range 0.18–0.19, confirming model stability.
Table 2熵权法权重系数Entropy weight coefficients for ESD
指标Indicator200020102020
GDP / 元·km⁻²0.365140.276880.28895
人口密度Pop. density / 万人·km⁻²0.615160.699080.68441
土地利用强度Land-use intensity0.019700.024030.02664

人口密度权重始终最高（0.62–0.70），反映生存基础需求在ESD中的主导地位；土地利用强度权重最低但逐期上升，说明空间干预对需求的影响力在增强。Population density weight remains highest (0.62–0.70), reflecting the dominance of basic subsistence demand. Land-use intensity has the lowest but rising weight, indicating growing influence of spatial intervention on demand.

03

时空格局与驱动力Spatiotemporal patterns & drivers

生态系统服务供给（ESS）时空格局Ecosystem service supply patterns

2000–2020年，浙江省ESS整体呈现西南高—东北低的空间梯度。高值集聚于浙西南丽水、衢州等山地生态屏障区（森林覆盖率高、地形陡峭），低值区位于杭嘉湖平原与东南沿海城市群（城镇化率>70%，建设用地占比>30%）。时序上，单位面积产水量与土壤保持量呈倒U型变化（峰值在2010年前后），碳储量与生境质量则单调递减——前者从150.25 t·km⁻²降至148.84，后者指数从0.78降至0.75。

From 2000 to 2020, ESS showed a southwest-high, northeast-low gradient. High values concentrated in southwestern mountainous ecological barriers (Lishui, Quzhou) with high forest cover and steep terrain; low values dominated the Hangzhou-Jiaxing-Huzhou Plain and southeastern coastal urban clusters (urbanization >70%, built-up land >30%). Temporally, water yield and soil conservation followed an inverted U-shape (peaking around 2010), while carbon storage and habitat quality declined monotonically — from 150.25 to 148.84 t·km⁻² and from 0.78 to 0.75, respectively.

Table 3浙江省单位面积平均生态系统服务供给量Average ecosystem service supply per unit area
指标Indicator200020102020
产水量Water yield / mm·km⁻²1,191.101,500.301,225.36
碳储量Carbon storage / t·km⁻²150.25149.31148.84
土壤保持量Soil conservation / t·km⁻²333,925409,036395,170
生境质量指数Habitat quality index0.780.770.75

生态系统服务需求（ESD）时空格局Ecosystem service demand patterns

ESD呈现与供给相反的东北高—西南低格局。地均GDP从617飙升至5,651万元·km⁻²（增幅816%），人口密度从453增至610人·km⁻²。高需求区集中于杭甬城市群（如杭州钱江世纪城、宁波东部新城），形成沿杭州湾产业带的"经济需求极核"——全省约20%面积的高需求区消耗了大量生态资源容量，体现"经济高地—生态洼地"的空间共轭效应。

ESD exhibited the inverse northeast-high, southwest-low pattern. GDP density surged from 617 to 5,651万元·km⁻² (+816%), population density from 453 to 610 persons·km⁻². High-demand zones concentrated in the Hangzhou-Ningbo urban corridor (e.g., Qianjiang Century City, Ningbo Eastern New Town), forming an "economic demand pole" along the Hangzhou Bay industrial belt — ~20% of the province's area consumed a disproportionate share of ecological capacity, exemplifying the "economic highland–ecological lowland" spatial conjugate effect.

Table 4浙江省单位面积生态系统服务需求量Ecosystem service demand per unit area
指标Indicator200020102020
地均GDPGDP density / 万元·km⁻²6172,1235,651
人口密度Pop. density / 人·km⁻²453530610
土地利用强度Land-use intensity2.332.362.40

供需比（ESDR）时空演变ESDR spatiotemporal dynamics

ESDR时序呈正U型演变：2000–2010年快速城镇化导致赤字区持续扩张，嘉兴全域成为赤字极核；2011年生态红线政策实施后趋势逆转——萧山、余杭由赤字转为盈余，丽水因纳入生态红线覆盖而持续维持高盈余状态。空间上，赤字区集中于杭嘉湖平原东北翼及东南沿海，盈余区分布于浙西南山地屏障。政策时序与空间响应高度一致，证实生态保护政策对ESDR空间格局具有精准调控作用。

ESDR followed a U-shaped trajectory: 2000–2010 saw accelerating deficits driven by urbanization, with Jiaxing becoming the deficit epicenter. After the 2011 Ecological Red Line policy, the trend reversed — Xiaoshan and Yuhang shifted from deficit to surplus, and Lishui maintained consistently high surplus under red-line protection. Spatially, deficits concentrated in the northeastern plain and southeastern coast, while surpluses persisted in southwestern mountains. The tight alignment between policy timing and spatial response confirms that ecological policies precisely regulate ESDR patterns.

驱动力分析：OPGD + 随机森林Driving force analysis: OPGD + RF

OPGD单因子探测表明：人口密度与GDP构成核心驱动要素（q>50%），其中人口密度解释力从53.1%提升至58.5%，超越GDP成为首要因子。NDVI与夜间灯光指数解释力跨越式提升，印证植被恢复与人类活动强度对ESDR的强化效应，形成自然-社会经济双核驱动态势。双因子交互分析显示所有因子间均为增强型交互——GDP与人口密度在杭嘉湖城市群形成强协同，推动赤字扩张；而生态修复政策下的NDVI与夜间灯光交互效应持续上升，驱动盈余恢复。随机森林多因子分析进一步揭示驱动力的动态演变：GDP重要性逐年走低但仍是核心因素，夜间灯光指数在2020年重要性飙升，超越人口因子，反映城市化后期人类活动空间集聚效应的增强。

OPGD single-factor analysis shows population density and GDP as core drivers (q>50%), with population density rising from 53.1% to 58.5% explanatory power, surpassing GDP. NDVI and nighttime light index saw dramatic increases, confirming the strengthening influence of vegetation recovery and human activity — forming a natural-socioeconomic dual-core driving pattern. All pairwise interactions were enhancement-type; GDP × population density synergized strongly in the Hangzhou-Jiaxing-Huzhou urban cluster, driving deficit expansion, while NDVI × nighttime light interactions under ecological restoration policies promoted surplus recovery. Random Forest multi-factor analysis revealed dynamic driver evolution: GDP importance declined yet remained core; nighttime light index surged in 2020, surpassing population, reflecting intensified spatial agglomeration effects in late-stage urbanization.

04

政策启示与展望Implications & outlook

本研究的核心贡献在于：一是构建的InVEST-OPGD-RF三层递进框架，为生态系统服务供需驱动机制解析提供了一套可复用的方法论工具，有效弥补传统线性模型对非线性交互效应刻画不足的缺陷；二是以浙江省为典型案例，从县域尺度揭示了城镇化进程、生态保护政策与ESDR演化的时空耦合规律，为长三角一体化示范区国土空间生态专项规划提供了定量依据。

This study contributes: (1) a reusable InVEST-OPGD-RF three-tier framework for analyzing ESDR driving mechanisms, overcoming the inability of traditional linear models to capture nonlinear interaction effects; (2) county-scale evidence from Zhejiang revealing the spatiotemporal coupling among urbanization, ecological policy, and ESDR dynamics — directly supporting ecological zoning in the Yangtze River Delta Integrated Demonstration Zone.

实践层面，建议基于ESDR空间分异实施差异化管控：杭嘉湖赤字极核区应严格约束新增建设用地，优先开展存量用地更新与生态修复，可借鉴珠三角"生态修复+城市更新"经验；西南盈余区（如丽水、衢州）应在保障生态安全底线基础上，探索生态产品价值实现路径，推动"绿水青山"向"金山银山"转化。未来研究可结合SHAP等可解释模型提升RF透明度，并融合社交媒体等多元数据纳入制度与文化"软驱动"因素。

For practice, we recommend differentiated governance based on ESDR spatial patterns: the Hangzhou-Jiaxing-Huzhou deficit core should strictly constrain new construction land, prioritizing urban renewal and ecological restoration, drawing on the Pearl River Delta's "eco-restoration + urban renewal" dual-drive model. Southwestern surplus zones (Lishui, Quzhou) should explore ecological product value realization pathways — translating "lucid waters and lush mountains" into "invaluable assets". Future work could integrate SHAP for RF interpretability and incorporate institutional/cultural "soft drivers" via social media and other novel data.
